item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stays direct and treats the prompt as a business decision framework for logistics-provider replacement. It does not fire triage, does not frame the trend analysis as repeated local repair pressure, and gives concrete attribution, loss, remediation, pilot, and switch/no-switch criteria."}
